modeDescription: Measured local/staging-safe load evidence is accepted only when all release-blocking thresholds pass. The harness remains bounded, synthetic, non-production, and zero-provider-call only.
requiredSafety: Exactly one of --local or --staging-safe is required.
Synthetic fixtures must contain no PII, raw reports, raw PDF bytes, or raw report text.
External provider calls must remain zero.
Parser, OCR, packet, packet PDF, violation, and deployment behavior must not change.

warningOnlyMode.effect: Threshold failures remain visible but do not close blockers 3, 16, or 17.

releaseBlockingMode.effect: Any failed threshold fails the measured load command and prevents blocker closure.
